scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n frontend,backend,admin -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w admin -- --port 5173"
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w admin
scripts.install:all: npm install -w frontend && npm install -w backend && npm install -w admin
